request.description:
BODY --- |**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default** |---|---|---|---|--- |emails|*|Array of email|Email of friends| |email_config|*|Object
  • subject
  • html
|Config of email |-----> subject| |String|Subject of email|Invitation |-----> html|*|String``|Body of mail|

This API will send a verify string used for Reset Password API thru email that you provided. When you pass HTML code to `html` key in `mail_cfg` param, you need to put `%verify_string%` format key inside the HTML code. Thru the format key, server will generate a hash string then replaces with the format key. See body example for clear. BODY --- |**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**| |---|---|---|---|---| |email |* |String |Email to send verify_string used for Reset Password API| |mail_cfg| |Object
  • subject``
  • html``
|To config mailer after performing action|

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|verify_string |* |String |Verify string got from email sent from Forgot Password API|
|new_password |* |String |New password |

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|old_password |* |String |Old password |
|new_password |* |String |New password |

QUERY PARAMS

---

| **Field**        | **Required** | **Type**                    | **Description**                                                                                      | **Default Value** |
|----------------|:----------:|---------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------|
| id             |            | Array of Number or Number | Search by id                                                                                       |                 |
| exclude_id     |            | Array of Number of Number | Search omit id                                                                                     |                 |
| order_by       |            | String                    | Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `last_name-asc`                         |                 |
| limit          |            | Number                    | Define number of record per page.                                                                  |                 |
| page           |            | Number                    | Define page to query                                                                               |                 |
| user_status    |      *     | Array of String or String | Search by status. If empty, list will return nothing Accepted value: `all`, `active`, `pending`, `locked` |                 |
| context_search |            | String                    | Search by first name or last name or username. This is ignored if `username` is defined in query   |                 |
| username       |            | String                    | Search by username. This is ignored if `context_search` is defined in query                        |                 |
| phone          |            | String                    | Search by phone number                                                                             |                 |
| email          |            | String                    | Search by email                                                                                    |                 |
| gender         |            | String                    | Search by gender Accepted value: `male`, `female`                                                  |                 |
| role_id        |            | Array of Number or Number | Search by role id                                                                                  |                 |
| or_search      |            | Object                    | Search by multiple fields with `OR` operation. Example: `{username: "Ozawa", last_name: "Tokuda"}` |                 |

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|username|*|String|Username should be an email or phone number **(with contry code)**
|pass |* |String |Define password of User | |
|email | |String |Define email of User. This is also `username` | |
|first_name |* |String |First name of User | |
|last_name |* |String |Last name of User | |
|phone | |String |Phone number of User | |
|gender | |String |Gender of User: `male`, `female` | |
|dob | |String |Day of birth. Based on format `YYYY-MM-DD`| |
|user_status |* |String |Status of User: `active`, `pending`, `locked` | |
|role_id |* |Number |Id of Role | |

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|first_name | |String |First name of User | |
|last_name | |String |Last name of User | |
|phone | |String |Phone number of User | |
|gender | |String |Gender of User: `male`, `female` | |
|dob | |String |Day of birth. Based on format `YYYY-MM-DD`| |
|user_status | |String |Status of User: `active`, `pending`, `locked` | |

QUERY PARAMS

---

| **Field**        | **Required** | **Type**                    | **Description**                                                                                      | **Default Value** |
|----------------|:----------:|---------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------|
|user_id| |Number| Search by User Id|
| friend_id             |            | Array of Number or Number | Search by friend id                                                                                       |                 |
|type| |String| Define this with value = `list-invitation` if you want to get list of invitation|
| order_by       |            | String                    | Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `last_name-asc`                         |                 |
| limit          |            | Number                    | Define number of record per page.                                                                  |                 |
| page           |            | Number                    | Define page to query                                                                               |                 |
| context_search |            | String                    | Search by first name or last name or username. This is ignored if `username` is defined in query   |                 |
| username       |            | String                    | Search by username. This is ignored if `context_search` is defined in query                        |                 |
| phone          |            | String                    | Search by phone number                                                                             |                 |
| email          |            | String                    | Search by email                                                                                    |                 |
| gender         |            | String                    | Search by gender Accepted value: `male`, `female`                                                  |                 |

BODY --- |**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**| |---|---|---|---|---| |friend_id |* |Array of Number |Ids of User | |relation_type |* |String |Type of relationship | |mail_cfg| |Object
  • subject``
  • html``
|To config mailer after performing action|

BODY --- |**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**| |---|---|---|---|---| |friend_id |* |Number |Id of User | |mail_cfg| |Object
  • subject``
  • html``
|To config mailer after performing action|

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|friend_id |* |String |Id of User |
|relation_type |* |String |Type of relationship |

QUERY PARAMS

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|friend_id |* |String |Id of User |

QUERY PARAMS

---

|**Field**|**Require**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**
|---|---|---|---|---
|limit| |Number|Number of record per page|20
|page| |Number|Page|1

response.name: New Feed

request.description:
QUERY PARAMS

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**
|---|---|---|---|---
| id  | | Array of Number or Number | Search by id    |
| exclude_id     | | Array of Number of Number | Search omit id  |
| order_by  | | String   | Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `created_at-desc`  |      created_at
| limit     | | Number   | Define number of record per page. |      10
| page      | | Number   | Define page to query  |      1
| or_search | | Object   | Search by multiple fields with `OR` operation. Example: `{username: "Ozawa", last_name: "Tokuda"}` |
|post_status|*|Array of String or String|Search by status. `all`, `publish`, `pending`, `trash`, `deleted`|
|post_content| |String|Search by Post's content
|user_id| |Number|Search by owner Id|

response.name: List Questions
List Questions
View Question

request.description:
BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**
|---|---|---|---|---
| post_content  |* | String | Content of Question    |
| post_status     |* | String | Status of Question. `publish`, `pending`, `trash`, `deleted`  | `publish`
|media_ids| |Array of Number|Id of Media|
|tag_people| |Array of Number|Id of User that is tagged|
|notify_config| |Object<{title: String}>| Config title for notification|

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**
|---|---|---|---|---|
|question_id|*|Number|Id of Question|
|media_ids|*|Array of Number|Id of Media|

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**
|---|---|---|---|---
| post_content  | | String | Content of Question    |
| post_status     | | String | Status of Question. `publish`, `pending`, `trash`, `deleted`  |
This just updates the status to `deleted`

BODY --- |**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**| |---|---|---|---|---| |friend_id |* |Number |Id of User | |mail_cfg| |Object
  • subject``
  • html``
|To config mailer after performing action|

QUERY PARAMS

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**
|---|---|---|---|---
| id  | | Array of Number or Number | Search by id    |
| exclude_id     | | Array of Number of Number | Search omit id  |
| order_by  | | String   | Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `created_at-desc`  |      created_at
| limit     | | Number   | Define number of record per page. |      10
| page      | | Number   | Define page to query  |      1
| or_search | | Object   | Search by multiple fields with `OR` operation. Example: `{username: "Ozawa", last_name: "Tokuda"}` |
|answer_status|*|Array of String or String|Search by status. `all`, `publish`, `pending`, `trash`, `deleted`|
|answer_content| |String|Search by Answer's content
|question_id| |Number|Search By Question's Id|
|user_id| |Number|Search by owner Id|
|parent_id| |Number|Search by owner Id. Maybe use to get reply of answer (e.g., facebook answer)|

|media_ids| |Array of Number|Id of media|
|tag_people| |Array of Number|Id of User that is tagged|
|notify_config| |Object<{title: String}>| Config title for notification|

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**
|---|---|---|---|---|
|answer_id|*|Number|Id of Answer|
|media_ids|*|Array of Number|Id of Media|

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**
|---|---|---|---|---

|question_id| |Number|Id of Question|
|answer_content| |String|Content of Answer|
|answer_status| |String|Status of Answer. `publish`, `pending`, `trash`, `deleted`|

request.description:
DATA RESPONSE

---

|**Field**|**Type**|**Description**
|---|---|---
|id|Number|Id of Media
|user_id|Number|Id of who uploaded
|media_attachment|Object|Contain Media location info
|media_type|String|Type of Media
|media_status|String|Status of Media
|signed_url|String|Url to download Media

item.name: Get Presigned Url to put object

request.description:
This API returns a pre-signed URL of S3 used to upload file. After uploading file successfully, need to use `/media/publish/:mediaId/[PUT]` to make the media be publish

Usage of Presigned Url: [Click here](https://medium.com/@aidan.hallett/securing-aws-s3-uploads-using-presigned-urls-aa821c13ae8d)

The pre-signed url lives in 3600s

response.name: Upload Media
Get Presigned Url to put object

request.description:
FORM DATA

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Desscription**|**Default Value**
|---|---|---|---|---
|media_upload|*|Array of file|Containing file info|

response.name: Upload Media

request.description: This publish a media after the object has been put to S3 successfully

response.name: Publish Media

request.description:
QUERY PARAMS

---

| **Field**| **Required** | **Type**| **Description** | **Default Value** |
|----------------|:----------:|---------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------|
| id| | Array of Number or Number | Search by id|
| sender_id| | Array of Number or Number | Search by sender id|
| recipient_id| | Array of Number or Number | Search by recipient id|
| excluded_id| | Array of Number or Number | Search omit id|
| order_by | | String| Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `created_at-desc` | created_at-desc
| limit | | Number| Define number of record per page. | 20
| page| | Number| Define page to query |1
| date_from | | String| Search from Date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD|
| date_to | | String| Search to Date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD |
| status |*|Array of String or String|Search by status. `all`, `new`, `seen`, `trash`|

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default Value**
|---|---|---|---|---
|recipient_id| *|Number|Id of recipient|
|messages| * |String|Message content|
|message_type|*|String|Type of notification
|status| |String|Status of notification. `new`, `seen`, `trash`|`new`

QUERY PARAMS

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default**
|---|---|---|---|---
|id| |Array of Number or Number|Search by id|
|exclude_id| |Array of Number or Number|Search omit id|
|page| |Number|Number of page|1
|limit| |Number|Number of record per page|20
|order_by| |String|Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `created_at-desc` | created_at-desc
|group_status|*|Array of String or String|Search by status. Missing will return Not Found. Accepted: `all`, `new`, `seen`, `trash`|
|group_name| |String|Search by name|
|user_id| |Number|Search by who created|

QUERY PARAMS

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default**
|---|---|---|---|---
|id| |Array of Number or Number|Search by id|
|exclude_id| |Array of Number or Number|Search omit id|
|page| |Number|Number of page|1
|limit| |Number|Number of record per page|20
|order_by| |String|Define sort. Format: {columnName-direction(asc/desc)}. Ex: `created_at-desc` | created_at-desc
|username| |String|Search by username|
|phone| |Array of String or String|Search by phone|
|email| |String|Search by email|
|gender| |String|Search by gender
|role| |Array of String or String|Search by role in group|

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default**
|---|---|---|---|---
|group_name|*|String|Name of Group|
|group_status|*|String|Status of Group: `publish`, `pending`, `trash`|
|member| |Array of Number|Id of member

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default**
|---|---|---|---|---
|group_id|*|Number|Id of Group
|user_id|*|Array of Number|Id of User to add

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default**
|---|---|---|---|---
|group_id|*|Number|Id of Group
|user_id|*|Array of Number|Id of User to remove

BODY

---

|**Field**|**Required**|**Type**|**Description**|**Default**
|---|---|---|---|---
|group_name| |String|Name of Group|
|group_status| |String|Status of Group: `publish`, `pending`, `trash`|
